items.name_en: Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
Quality: Original Sample
Model: 8802
Color: Champagne
Size: 12*18*10cm
FENDI's latest masterpiece, featuring the standout vintage FF letter embossed print, which is the brand's most classic pattern. The exquisite bucket shape adds to its outstanding appeal, looking beautiful when worn. Based on authentic purchase patterns, original sample level, exquisite workmanship.

items.name_en: Name: FENDI Vintage Print (Makeup Pouch, Lunch Box Bag)
items.name_cn:
Name: FENDI Vintage Print (Makeup Pouch, Lunch Box Bag)
Quality: Top-tier Original single
Model: 8856
Color: Brown Fabric with Brown Leather
Size: 16*10*13
🔱FENDI🔱 deeply loved by Douyin influencers and bloggers ♡ This vintage print bestseller can be called: a makeup pouch or a lunch box bag 😇 Although this lunch box is square, its feature is: soft, slouchy, and lazy, very casual. It doesn't look too formal when worn, especially stylish. Most importantly, the capacity is huge 🤘🏿 simply a small body with a big belly! 😱 Fendi vintage print striped fabric 🔥 is on fire, it doesn't look out of place with any color of clothes. Major influencers, bloggers, and websites are all aggressively promoting the Fendi vintage print striped series 🕺🏾🕺 When you understand vintage, you'll discover that every vintage bag has its own unique flavor 🔥

items.name_en: Name: Fendi Waist Bag
items.name_cn:
Name: Fendi Waist Bag
Quality: Original Single
Model: 8805
Color: Pure Black
Size: 17.5*11*3.5cm (Belt Length 120cm)
Fendi's latest masterpiece, featuring the standout vintage FF letter embossed print and the brand's classic FF plaid pattern. A simple, compact, and practical shape, paired with a belt and chain strap, it can be worn at the waist or crossbody. The design is truly unique, highlighting elegance and nobility when worn.

items.name_en: NANO ALMA MINI Shell Collection M82717 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
NANO ALMA MINI Shell Collection M82717 Uninspected Version
■Size: 18*12*8cm ■
Nano Alma captures the essence of the classic!
A Mini refined and compact design that makes a splash, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!
The iconic Shell silhouette, which has always held center stage since 1934, is simple yet elegant and fashionable. It is an essential 'must-have' for every girl.
Its refined and compact shape looks like a stylish pendant when worn, with enough capacity to meet daily needs!
The new design is more user-friendly, satisfying various height requirements. It's a beauty icon—promise me, you really need to get this!

NANO SPEEDY Handbag【M13391】White Multicolor m13406 Black Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
Crafted from classic Monogram Hl canvas, the Nano Speedy handbag exudes ultimate femininity and is an ideal choice for carrying daily items. This handbag is the perfect miniature version of the original Speedy, featuring exquisite stitching and being incredibly lightweight. ✨Shoulder strap is detachable and adjustable
Size 16.0 x 11.0 x 9.0 cm.
